question:
What makes a joke cross the line into bullying?
A) When the "joke" repeatedly targets a person's vulnerabilities and causes them distress.
B) When the joke does not make everyone in the room laugh out loud.
C) When the joke contains a pun.
D) Bullying only occurs if physical violence is explicitly threatened.
